text: Finding myself in this modern, open space fills me with a reflective calm. The glass walls and neatly arranged chairs hint at anticipation—a place meant for gathering minds. Stepping into the R+D exhibit, I am immediately drawn to the interplay of words and visuals. The text on the screen resonates with my own suspicions about ordinary moments: that even the quiet bustle of daily life holds the potential for wonder and philosophical inquiry. Here, I feel suspended between curiosity and contemplation, eager to explore how meaning arises from our most familiar surroundings. This is a place that invites both questioning and connection. I feel inspired, quietly alive to possibility.
